title: [codereview-1] _gateways dict should track additional coordination state
description: After adding _gateways tracking in simulation.py:129, observed that SimNode alone insufficient for multi-gateway model (needs slot_map, backbone_status, owned_nodes, negotiation_state). This is P2 as it affects scalability test scenarios. Tagged codereview. Discovered-from:project-LICHEN-mugl.2
